title: Double Barrel
subTitle: Pancho and Vinci struggle to make money to buy precious stones from a don. When they attempt to make a crucial deal, complications arise and a large-scale gang war erupts.

title: Love in Singapore
subTitle: Machu an impoverished orphan, becomes successful in his life through hard work and determination. However, when a fraudster dupes him twice, he follows him to Singapore to confront him.

subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Love Story
subTitle: A Christian Zumba instructor falls for a starry-eyed upper caste Hindu girl. In their quest for happiness, they must first overcome a massive caste divide.

title: College Days
subTitle: The lives of a group of young medical students take a sudden turn when one of them kills Ananthu, a classmate, and the entire event gets recorded on camera.

title: Rajavinte Makan
subTitle: With the help of Vincent, a criminal, Krishnadas builds a successful political career. However, things go awry when he double-crosses the gangster, who then vows to exact revenge on him.

title: Sandwich
subTitle: Engineer Sai accidentally kills the brother of a criminal. However, things take an interesting turn after the criminal's rival offers protection to Sai on the condition that he marries his daughter.

title: Aakashamittayee
subTitle: A supportive father encourages his son to chase his dreams, while another forces his own ambitions onto his child. Meanwhile, a third remains indifferent towards his child.

title: Naadody
subTitle: In search of Andrew who had promised him a job, Sachidananda ends up saving a millionaire's granddaughter. This gets him entangled in a series of grave issues.

title: Natholi Oru Cheriya Meenalla
subTitle: After experiencing a bizarre series of events in his flat, Preman begins writing a fictional story. However, things spiral out of control when he loses his grip on the characters of his story.

subTitle: A truck driver is consumed by the phenomenon of sex. However, in an unforeseen turn of events, he ends up murdering his family.

title: Vesham
subTitle: When businessman Appu's younger brother Hari is accused in a murder case, the former takes the blame to protect his sibling and also avenges the wrongdoing of his trade rival, Sivan.

title: Kavacham
subTitle: Twin brothers, separated at birth and raised in different homes, are unaware of each other's existence until a shocking reunion as adults reveals their shared identity.

title: Arikil Oraal
subTitle: Siddharth, the creative head of an advertising agency, and his girlfriend, Veena, try to solve the mystery of Icha, their friend, who always appears to be in two different places at the same time.

title: Kaazhcha
subTitle: A middle-aged man experiences an unexpected change in life after taking a displaced young boy under his wing. However, he faces numerous legal hurdles in his quest to adopt the youngster.

subTitle: A mass outbreak of Nipah virus, in the state of Kerala, causes tremendous fear in the hearts of the people. However, a group of courageous individuals step up and attempt to curb the epidemic.

subTitle: After a failed business, Joy, an aspiring entrepreneur, discovers a brilliant idea which involves the use of elephant urine. However, he finds himself at loggerheads with a politician.
